1 PC Ground
[1 CH/PC Air]

cells.text: Chains into 5LP/2LP/2LK; high active frame count makes it a useful meaty (up to +8/+1); SA2 cancel: +8/+1; DR cancel is delayed until after 3rd active frame

cells.html: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; DR cancel is delayed until after 3rd active frame

cells.text: Strong combo/pressure starter and meaty tool, especially out of Drive Rush to minimize pushback; meaty timing can be up to +10/+5; SA2 cancel: +14/+9; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

cells.text: 8f startup for 2nd hit only; 1st hit can combo from 5LP and has enough hitstun to combo to 214HK for a launch and Fuha stock; great poke in neutral (1st hit can interrupt opponent's button while 2nd hit extends for long range); very effective when used out of Drive Rush; SA2 cancel: +19/+7 (1st hit)
cells.html: 8f startup for 2nd hit only; 1st hit can combo from 5LP and has enough hitstun to combo to 214HK for a launch and Fuha stock; great poke in neutral (1st hit can interrupt opponent's button while 2nd hit extends for long range); very effective when used out of Drive Rush; SA2 cancel: +19/+7 (1st hit)

cells.text: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); 1st hit has 4f less hitstun (cannot combo into 214HK); when chained into, 4f shorter hitconfirm window (2f if 2nd hit only); maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents

cells.text: Not airborne despite the animation; Counter-Hit/Punish Counter puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; Punish Counter also puts grounded opponents into limited juggle state with a follow-up juggle; long range and safe on block makes it great in neutral; better frame advantage when well spaced (very difficult to connect with the final active frame); extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles
cells.html: Not airborne despite the animation; Counter-Hit/Punish Counter puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; Punish Counter also puts grounded opponents into limited juggle state with a follow-up juggle; long range and safe on block makes it great in neutral; better frame advantage when well spaced (very difficult to connect with the final active frame); extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles

cells.text: Becomes fully cancelable during FSE, even when not chained into; not airborne despite the animation; maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; 2f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 5th recovery frame; extends a hurtbox 1f before active that is vulnerable to projectiles

cells.text: Chained Feng Shui Engine version; not airborne despite the animation; the special/chain cancel window only applies when chaining into 6MK and the KD doesn't allow anything to juggle on hit; 2 extra recovery frames on whiff; special/DR cancel is delayed until after 2nd active frame

cells.text: 3f extra recovery on whiff; both hits are cancelable; 23f startup for 2nd hit only; 1st hit has more hitstun and blockstun for cancels; both hits put airborne opponent into limited juggle state; carries counter-hit/Punish Counter advantage through both hits; extended whiff hurtbox lasts until the end of recovery; SA2 cancel: +18/+8 (1st hit), +17/+11 (2nd hit)
cells.html: 3f extra recovery on whiff; both hits are cancelable; 23f startup for 2nd hit only; 1st hit has more hitstun and blockstun for cancels; both hits put airborne opponent into limited juggle state; carries counter-hit/Punish Counter advantage through both hits; extended whiff hurtbox lasts until the end of recovery; SA2 cancel: +18/+8 (1st hit), +17/+11 (2nd hit)

cells.text: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); 3f extra recovery on whiff; maintains juggle state vs. airborne opponents; 4f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into; canceling the 1st hit uses less juggle potential, allowing alternate juggle routes in exchange for some initial damage; extended whiff hurtbox lasts until the end of recovery

cells.text: Both hits are cancelable; 1st hit forces stand and puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state; 2nd hit causes OTG bounce vs. airborne opponents; 19f startup for 2nd hit only; carries counter-hit/Punish Counter advantage through both hits; SA2 cancel: +12/+6 (1st hit), +16/+8 (2nd hit)

cells.text: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); both hits knock down; 2nd hit causes OTG bounce vs. airborne opponents; 8f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into
cells.html: Chained version during SA2 (FSE); both hits knock down; 2nd hit causes OTG bounce vs. airborne opponents; 8f shorter hitconfirm window when chained into

cells.text: Safe Target Combo starter that leaves ample time to confirm the final hit; leaves a 2f blockstring gap after 5MP
cells.html: Safe Target Combo starter that leaves ample time to confirm the final hit; leaves a 2f blockstring gap after 5MP

cells.text: (refers to scaled damage); not airborne despite the animation; always a true blockstring from 4HP; puts opponent into limited juggle state; cannot cancel into Super on block
cells.html: (refers to scaled damage); not airborne despite the animation; always a true blockstring from 4HP; puts opponent into limited juggle state; cannot cancel into Super on block

cells.text: Has access to corner throw loops by dashing (+3); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously
cells.html: Has access to corner throw loops by dashing (+3); a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

cells.text: No throw oki after back throwing opponent into corner, but can use meaty strikes; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously
cells.html: No throw oki after back throwing opponent into corner, but can use meaty strikes; a successful Throw Escape builds 0.5 Drive bars for the defender; Throw Escape is awarded to a random player if input simultaneously

cells.text: KD Adv. varies based on height (lower height = worse advantage); switches sides; no oki after throwing opponent back into the corner
cells.html: KD Adv. varies based on height (lower height = worse advantage); switches sides; no oki after throwing opponent back into the corner

cells.text: See Drive Impact. Airborne connect gives spinning juggle state on Punish Counter or corner Wall Splat with variable height.
cells.html: See Drive Impact. Airborne connect gives spinning juggle state on Punish Counter or corner Wall Splat with variable height.

cells.text: Performed by inputting 6HPHK during blockstun; 5f extra recovery on hit; freezes the screen for 4f during startup; see Drive Reversal.
cells.html: Performed by inputting 6HPHK during blockstun; 5f extra recovery on hit; freezes the screen for 4f during startup; see Drive Reversal.

cells.text: Performed by holding 6HPHK on wakeup; 5f extra recovery on hit; does not have any screen freeze except for a 12f freeze when interacting with the opponent's throw hitbox (this also refunds 1 Drive bar after punishing the throw); see Drive Reversal.
cells.html: Performed by holding 6HPHK on wakeup; 5f extra recovery on hit; does not have any screen freeze except for a 12f freeze when interacting with the opponent's throw hitbox (this also refunds 1 Drive bar after punishing the throw); see Drive Reversal.

cells.text: See Drive Parry. Perfect Parrying has only 1F of recovery and disables the opponent from canceling their attack. Perfect Parrying projectiles puts you into fixed 11 frames of recovery. After a Perfect Parry, all Super Gauge gain is reduced by 20% and Drive Gauge gain/damage is reduced by 50% for the entire punish combo.
cells.html: See Drive Parry. Perfect Parrying has only 1F of recovery and disables the opponent from canceling their attack. Perfect Parrying projectiles puts you into fixed 11 frames of recovery. After a Perfect Parry, all Super Gauge gain is reduced by 20% and Drive Gauge gain/damage is reduced by 50% for the entire punish combo.

cells.text: See Drive Rush; 1-bar version performed out of a Parry; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation (if performed immediately after a successful Parry, only 1+8 startup); the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties; Distance: 0.641 (min/throw), 2.479 (min/block), 3.999 (max/final DR frame)
cells.html: See Drive Rush; 1-bar version performed out of a Parry; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation (if performed immediately after a successful Parry, only 1+8 startup); the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties; Distance: 0.641 (min/throw), 2.479 (min/block), 3.999 (max/final DR frame)

cells.text: See Drive Rush; 3-bar version performed on hit/block from a cancelable normal; can also be performed on whiff from cancelable light normals; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation; the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties
cells.html: See Drive Rush; 3-bar version performed on hit/block from a cancelable normal; can also be performed on whiff from cancelable light normals; startup refers to minimum time before an attack can cancel the Drive Rush animation; the first 15 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack; the final 22 recovery frames are cancelable into any attack or movement option or blocking (except Parry); only Normal and Command Normal attacks are enhanced with +4 frame advantage and improved juggle properties

cells.text: Gains 1 Fuha stock on hit/block/whiff on frame 10; 1-hit projectile clash hitbox on frames 8-13; puts opponent into limited juggle state (only combos into SA3); does not move forward during startup; 2f extra recovery on whiff; 8f hitstop when clashing with projectile
cells.html: Gains 1 Fuha stock on hit/block/whiff on frame 10; 1-hit projectile clash hitbox on frames 8-13; puts opponent into limited juggle state (only combos into SA3); does not move forward during startup; 2f extra recovery on whiff; 8f hitstop when clashing with projectile

cells.text: Gains 1 Fuha stock on hit/block/whiff on frame 13; 1-hit projectile clash hitbox on frames 11-16; puts opponent into limited juggle state (only combos into SA3); takes small step forward, making it more consistent in combos (but does not combo naturally from 5LK); 8f hitstop when clashing with projectile
cells.html: Gains 1 Fuha stock on hit/block/whiff on frame 13; 1-hit projectile clash hitbox on frames 11-16; puts opponent into limited juggle state (only combos into SA3); takes small step forward, making it more consistent in combos (but does not combo naturally from 5LK); 8f hitstop when clashing with projectile

cells.text: Gains 1 Fuha stock on hit/block/whiff on frame 25; 1-hit projectile clash hitbox on frames 23-28; launches opponent high into a limited juggle state; takes large step forward (but only combos naturally from 5HP, 2HP, and first hit of 5MK and 6HP); 2f extra recovery on block; 8f hitstop when clashing with projectile
cells.html: Gains 1 Fuha stock on hit/block/whiff on frame 25; 1-hit projectile clash hitbox on frames 23-28; launches opponent high into a limited juggle state; takes large step forward (but only combos naturally from 5HP, 2HP, and first hit of 5MK and 6HP); 2f extra recovery on block; 8f hitstop when clashing with projectile

cells.text: Gains 1 Fuha stock on hit/block/whiff on frame 12; 2-hit OD projectile clash hitbox on frames 10-17; launches opponent high into a free juggle state (limited juggle when 214KK is juggled into); takes small step forward (consistent like the MK version while comboing naturally from light normals); SA2 cancel: KD+49/-8; 8f hitstop when clashing with projectile
cells.html: Gains 1 Fuha stock on hit/block/whiff on frame 12; 2-hit OD projectile clash hitbox on frames 10-17; launches opponent high into a free juggle state (limited juggle when 214KK is juggled into); takes small step forward (consistent like the MK version while comboing naturally from light normals); SA2 cancel: KD+49/-8; 8f hitstop when clashing with projectile

cells.text: 1-hit projectile hitbox (can lose to projectile-invuln moves); very short range
cells.html: 1-hit projectile hitbox (can lose to projectile-invuln moves); very short range

cells.text: 1-hit projectile; costs 1 Fuha stock; can press MK or HK to cancel into other 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock (within the first 3 active frames)
cells.html: 1-hit projectile; costs 1 Fuha stock; can press MK or HK to cancel into other 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock (within the first 3 active frames)

cells.text: 2-hit OD projectile; only the 2nd hit knocks down; can press MK or HK to cancel into other OD 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock and 1 Drive bar; SA2 cancel: KD+57/+17
cells.html: 2-hit OD projectile; only the 2nd hit knocks down; can press MK or HK to cancel into other OD 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock and 1 Drive bar; SA2 cancel: KD+57/+17

cells.text: 8-27f low crush; KD vs. airborne opponents; hitbox gradually expands forward during active frames (easier to space more safely); active frames 2-4 cause a knockdown; proximity guard box appears on frame 5 to make it harder for the opponent to walk out of range
cells.html: 8-27f low crush; KD vs. airborne opponents; hitbox gradually expands forward during active frames (easier to space more safely); active frames 2-4 cause a knockdown; proximity guard box appears on frame 5 to make it harder for the opponent to walk out of range

cells.text: Costs 1 Fuha stock; 8-27f low crush; puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle OTG bounce state (useful for SA3 cancel); can press LK or HK to cancel into other 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock; hitbox gradually expands forward during active frames (easier to space more safely)
cells.html: Costs 1 Fuha stock; 8-27f low crush; puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle OTG bounce state (useful for SA3 cancel); can press LK or HK to cancel into other 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock; hitbox gradually expands forward during active frames (easier to space more safely)

cells.text: 8-27f low crush; puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle OTG bounce state; pressing LK or HK cancels to other OD 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock + 1 Drive bar; hitbox gradually expands forward during active frames (easier to space more safely); SA2 cancel: +16/-3
cells.html: 8-27f low crush; puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle OTG bounce state; pressing LK or HK cancels to other OD 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock + 1 Drive bar; hitbox gradually expands forward during active frames (easier to space more safely); SA2 cancel: +16/-3

cells.text: Puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state (only high airborne connect launches high enough for follow-up juggle besides SA3 cancel); good juggle ender for damage when canceling to SA3
cells.html: Puts airborne opponents into limited juggle state (only high airborne connect launches high enough for follow-up juggle besides SA3 cancel); good juggle ender for damage when canceling to SA3

cells.text: Costs 1 Fuha stock; both hits are Super cancelable; can press LK or MK to cancel into other 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock; puts opponent into limited juggle state (only airborne hit launches high enough for follow-up juggle besides SA3 cancel); good for damage when comboing into SA3
cells.html: Costs 1 Fuha stock; both hits are Super cancelable; can press LK or MK to cancel into other 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock; puts opponent into limited juggle state (only airborne hit launches high enough for follow-up juggle besides SA3 cancel); good for damage when comboing into SA3

cells.text: All 3 hits are Super cancelable; first hit keeps opponent grounded, 2nd and 3rd hits put opponent into limited juggle state; can press LK or MK to cancel any hit into other OD 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock and 1 Drive bar; SA2 cancel: +17/+17 (1st hit), KD+54/+15 (2nd hit), KD+52/+4 (3rd hit); 3rd hit cannot juggle into held SA2 dash attack
cells.html: All 3 hits are Super cancelable; first hit keeps opponent grounded, 2nd and 3rd hits put opponent into limited juggle state; can press LK or MK to cancel any hit into other OD 236K specials for 1 Fuha stock and 1 Drive bar; SA2 cancel: +17/+17 (1st hit), KD+54/+15 (2nd hit), KD+52/+4 (3rd hit); 3rd hit cannot juggle into held SA2 dash attack

cells.text: Both hits are SA3 cancelable; not airborne; fairly consistent combo ender; 2nd hit has a combo-only hitbox for juggle consistency
cells.html: Both hits are SA3 cancelable; not airborne; fairly consistent combo ender; 2nd hit has a combo-only hitbox for juggle consistency

cells.text: Strong anti-air but cannot hit cross-up; slightly less horizontal range than 623HP
cells.html: Strong anti-air but cannot hit cross-up; slightly less horizontal range than 623HP

cells.text: Only 1 hit connects vs. crouch block (4f worse oB, less chip damage); strong combo ender and anti-air but cannot hit cross-up; slightly more horizontal range than 623MP
cells.html: Only 1 hit connects vs. crouch block (4f worse oB, less chip damage); strong combo ender and anti-air but cannot hit cross-up; slightly more horizontal range than 623MP

cells.text: Juri's primary reversal option; final attack comes out on hit only; cannot hit cross-up
cells.html: Juri's primary reversal option; final attack comes out on hit only; cannot hit cross-up

cells.text: During forward jump only; can input follow-up on hit only; puts opponent into limited juggle state (lower connect allows better follow-up juggles); button strength does not affect trajectory
cells.html: During forward jump only; can input follow-up on hit only; puts opponent into limited juggle state (lower connect allows better follow-up juggles); button strength does not affect trajectory

cells.text: Comes out on hit only; can delay the input to get better KD Advantage; no follow-up after juggle state; Juri is in a crouching state during landing recovery; total recovery time before landing varies by juggle height
cells.html: Comes out on hit only; can delay the input to get better KD Advantage; no follow-up after juggle state; Juri is in a crouching state during landing recovery; total recovery time before landing varies by juggle height

cells.text: During forward jump only; can input follow-up on hit only; puts opponent into limited juggle state
cells.html: During forward jump only; can input follow-up on hit only; puts opponent into limited juggle state

cells.text: Puts opponent into limited juggle state; comes out on hit only; can delay the input to get better juggle follow-ups and better KD Adv.; Juri is in a crouching state during landing recovery; total recovery time before landing varies by juggle height
cells.html: Puts opponent into limited juggle state; comes out on hit only; can delay the input to get better juggle follow-ups and better KD Adv.; Juri is in a crouching state during landing recovery; total recovery time before landing varies by juggle height

cells.text: Projectile hitbox; active frames and KD Adv. are highly variable based on screen position; Full Dmg distribution: 200x4,300,700
cells.html: Projectile hitbox; active frames and KD Adv. are highly variable based on screen position; Full Dmg distribution: 200x4,300,700

cells.text: Projectile hitbox; requires one Fuha stock to use (consumes this stock); active frames and KD Adv. are highly variable based on screen position; Full Dmg distribution: 200x4,300,1000
cells.html: Projectile hitbox; requires one Fuha stock to use (consumes this stock); active frames and KD Adv. are highly variable based on screen position; Full Dmg distribution: 200x4,300,1000

cells.text: Lasts 600 frames (10 seconds); timer stops counting down during attack hit/block freeze; allows Juri to chain into normals of equal or ascending strength (cannot chain back into the same attack); chains change the properties of certain moves (6MK and Heavy normals become knockdowns); 5HK/2LK/2HK/6MK become cancelable
cells.html: Lasts 600 frames (10 seconds); timer stops counting down during attack hit/block freeze; allows Juri to chain into normals of equal or ascending strength (cannot chain back into the same attack); chains change the properties of certain moves (6MK and Heavy normals become knockdowns); 5HK/2LK/2HK/6MK become cancelable

cells.text: Holding the button performs a dash attack; puts airborne opponents into free juggle state or maintains existing juggle state; can cancel on hit/block into any normal; afterwards, has same properties as regular Feng Shui Engine activation; dash attack cannot hit cross-up
cells.html: Holding the button performs a dash attack; puts airborne opponents into free juggle state or maintains existing juggle state; can cancel on hit/block into any normal; afterwards, has same properties as regular Feng Shui Engine activation; dash attack cannot hit cross-up

cells.text: Cinematic time regenerates ~2 Drive bars for Juri
cells.html: Cinematic time regenerates ~2 Drive bars for Juri

cells.text: Available at 25% HP or below; cinematic time regenerates ~2.4 Drive bars for Juri
cells.html: Available at 25% HP or below; cinematic time regenerates ~2.4 Drive bars for Juri
